description: Identifies unused module-provided Puppet types by combining static filesystem discovery with live PuppetDB resource data. Reports two categories separately: defined types (Puppet-language `define` declarations in manifests/) and custom types (native Ruby types via Puppet::Type.newtype in lib/puppet/type/). A type is considered unused when it has never appeared as a resource in any active node's catalog within the staleness window.

environment.description: Puppet environment to analyse. Defaults to 'production'.

env_dir.description: Absolute path to the environment directory on the Primary Server. Defaults to the path derived from `puppet config print environmentpath` and the environment parameter.

modules_dir.description: Absolute path to the modules directory to scan. Defaults to <env_dir>/modules.

puppetdb_host.description: Hostname or IP of PuppetDB. Defaults to the target node's certname.

stale_days.description: Exclude nodes whose last report is older than this many days. Defaults to 30.

cert.description: Path to a PEM-encoded client certificate.

key.description: Path to a PEM-encoded client private key.

ca_cert.description: Path to the PEM-encoded CA certificate.
